channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Surgery increasingly denied to patients with severe obesity
item.description: Surgical volume has not kept up with rising rates of higher-BMI obesity, according to an analysis.

item.title: Could a constipation drug clear depression's 'brain fog'?
item.description: A small study suggests prucalopride, approved for chronic constipation, may improve cognition in patients with depression.

item.title: Dostarlimab improves long-term survival in endometrial cancer
item.description: At four years, dostarlimab plus chemotherapy cut the risk of death by two-thirds in patients with dMMR/MSI-H advanced endometrial cancer.

item.title: Gene therapy appears safe for FA cardiomyopathy
item.description: Intravenous gene therapy delivering the frataxin gene shows safety and early signs of reduced heart damage in FA patients.
